'''molataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadenhearted|leadenhearted]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadenhearted|leadenhearted]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| molataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:molatithi|molatithi]] || [[word:molatiji|molatiji]] || [[word:molatishi|molatishi]] || [[word:molatiki|molatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:molatuthuthu|molatuthuthu]] || [[word:molatujuju|molatujuju]] || [[word:molatushushu|molatushushu]] || [[word:molatukuku|molatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:molatuthu|molatuthu]] || [[word:molatuju|molatuju]] || [[word:molatushu|molatushu]] || [[word:molatuku|molatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:molatufthuf|molatufthuf]] || [[word:molatufjuf|molatufjuf]] || [[word:molatufshuf|molatufshuf]] || [[word:molatufkuf|molatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:molatethe|molatethe]] || [[word:molateje|molateje]] || [[word:molateshe|molateshe]] || [[word:molateke|molateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:molatothotho|molatothotho]] || [[word:molatojojo|molatojojo]] || [[word:molatoshosho|molatoshosho]] || [[word:molatokoko|molatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:molatotho|molatotho]] || [[word:molatojo|molatojo]] || [[word:molatosho|molatosho]] || [[word:molatoko|molatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:molatofthof|molatofthof]] || [[word:molatofjof|molatofjof]] || [[word:molatofshof|molatofshof]] || [[word:molatofkof|molatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:molatÃŸfthÃŸf|molatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfjÃŸf|molatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfshÃŸf|molatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfkÃŸf|molatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:molatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|molatÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|molatÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|molatÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|molatÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:molatÃŸfthÃŸf|molatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfjÃŸf|molatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfshÃŸf|molatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfkÃŸf|molatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:molatÃŸfthÃŸf|molatÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfjÃŸf|molatÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfshÃŸf|molatÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:molatÃŸfkÃŸf|molatÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:molatÃḊthÃḊ|molatÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:molatÃḊjÃḊ|molatÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:molatÃḊshÃḊ|molatÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:molatÃḊkÃḊ|molatÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:molatathatha|molatathatha]] || [[word:molatajaja|molatajaja]] || [[word:molatashasha|molatashasha]] || [[word:molatakaka|molatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:molatatha|molatatha]] || [[word:molataja|molataja]] || [[word:molatasha|molatasha]] || [[word:molataka|molataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:molatafthaf|molatafthaf]] || [[word:molatafjaf|molatafjaf]] || [[word:molatafshaf|molatafshaf]] || [[word:molatafkaf|molatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:molatasha|molatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:molatshÃḋsha|molatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molatrosha|molatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molatmusha|molatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:molatyasha|molatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolatnkshÃḋsha|gomolatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolatnkrosha|gomolatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolatnkmusha|gomolatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolatnkyasha|gomolatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:molalatasha|molalatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molalatshÃḋsha|molalatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molalatrosha|molalatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molalatmusha|molalatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molalatyasha|molalatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolalatnkshÃḋsha|gomolalatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolalatnkrosha|gomolalatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolalatnkmusha|gomolalatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolalatnkyasha|gomolalatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:melÃḊtasha|melÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:melÃḊtshÃḋsha|melÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:melÃḊtrosha|melÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:melÃḊtmusha|melÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:melÃḊtyasha|melÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|gomelÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomelÃḊtnkrosha|gomelÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomelÃḊtnkmusha|gomelÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomelÃḊtnkyasha|gomelÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:molfatasha|molfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:molfatshÃḋsha|molfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:molfatrosha|molfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:molfatmusha|molfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:molfatyasha|molfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomolfatnkshÃḋsha|gomolfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomolfatnkrosha|gomolfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomolfatnkmusha|gomolfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomolfatnkyasha|gomolfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
